case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. DYNAMIC TRANSIT COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DYNAMIC TRANSIT COMPANY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-01-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-2001 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-30-2002

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-10-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. THE MAR-01-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-10-2002 CONTINUED TO MAY-15-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). APR-10-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST DAVID S. BRAHINSKY, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-22-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-14-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DAVE DAVENPORT, #1694. (212). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-22-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2002, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-22-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
